evals.expected_output: Skill is triggered and ready to review code diffs, PRs, or files for the Black Duck plugin.

evals.prompt: Review this code diff for the Black Duck plugin. New service class CoverityBridgeService.java added but no corresponding test. Check for: missing test classes, Jackson/LoggerWrapper patterns, exception handling patterns.
evals.expected_output: Finding: CoverityBridgeService.java has no test class. Add CoverityBridgeServiceTest.java following existing service test patterns.

evals.prompt: Review a change to ToolsParameterService.buildCommandLineArgs(). Parameter map being built via string concatenation instead of Jackson POJO serialization. Check for anti-patterns: direct string concat to JSON, no POJO usage, missing ObjectMapper.
evals.expected_output: Finding: Parameters built via string concat, should use Jackson ObjectMapper + POJO for type safety and Bridge input validation.

evals.prompt: Review code in ScanInitializer that logs scan parameters using raw Jenkins TaskListener instead of LoggerWrapper. Check for: direct TaskListener usage, missing LoggerWrapper imports, inconsistent logging patterns.
evals.expected_output: Finding: Raw TaskListener.getLogger() used. Replace with LoggerWrapper.getLogger() for consistent prefix and log routing.
